title: selaginella intermedia
intro: Selaginella intermedia, also known as the spikemoss or lesser spike moss, is a type of small, non-vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella intermedia are said to include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infection. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a component in tinctures and salves, although its use and efficacy may vary depending on the specific preparation and individual needs.
